name: @openvole/paw-memory
description: Persistent memory — markdown-based long-term and daily memory

tools.name: memory_read
tools.description: Read a memory file (MEMORY.md or a daily log)

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Write or append to a memory file

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search across all memory files for relevant content

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all memory files with dates
